leadText: Flying can refer to several aspects of a Pokémon: The Flying type, one of the eighteen types that a Pokémon can have. The Flying Egg Group, which encompasses mostly birdlike Pokémon. Flight, a game mechanic that allows fast travel in the core series Pokémon games. The move Fly. The semi-invulnerable turn that applies to a Pokémon using the move Fly in battle.
